description: Three successive corrections: wrong day (Thursday -> Wednesday), wrong time (3 PM -> 2 PM), wrong room (main conference room -> annex). Expected event uses all final corrected values.

events.title: Sprint Planning
events.reasoning: Alice makes three corrections: day (Thursday to Wednesday), time (3 PM to 2 PM), and room (main conference room to annex). The final confirmed values are Wednesday at 2 PM in the annex, explicitly confirmed by both speakers.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour as standard for sprint planning. All three corrections tracked: final day = Wednesday, final time = 2 PM, final location = Annex.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: sprint planning on Wednesday at 2 PM in the annex, after three successive corrections to day, time, and location.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Wednesday = 2026-02-25. Critical: track all three corrections. Initial: Thursday/3pm/main conference room. Final: Wednesday/2pm/annex. Bob confirms final values explicitly.
